metadata.description: A collection of reusable skills for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review code changes as an expert maintainer against project standards

plugins.name: doc-review
plugins.description: Review documentation changes as a documentation and technical writing expert

plugins.name: pr-reading-order
plugins.description: Suggest the best reading order to understand and review a PR's code changes

plugins.name: refactor-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze refactoring for structural regressions including DRY violations, abstraction bypasses, and behavioral changes

plugins.name: test-review
plugins.description: Review test code as a test expert and python packaging specialist
